name: string (影片標題)
category: hook | story | product | emotion | twist (影片核心類型)
tags: string (標籤，例如：#美食, #開箱, #教學)

narrative.type: story | situational | dialogue | montage (敘事手法)
narrative.tone: humor | emotional | suspense | casual (整體語調)

hook.type: curiosity | shock | humor | conflict (鉤子類型)
hook.position: start | middle | end (鉤子出現位置)

marketing.exposureType: none | logo | product | environment | prop (品牌/產品暴露形式)
marketing.brandRole: none | passive | active (品牌在片中的角色)
marketing.integrationMethod: none | background | dialogue | plot | twist (置入手法)
marketing.revealTiming: none | early | middle | late (揭露時機)
marketing.persuasionStyle: none | direct | subtle | emotional (說服風格)

structure.camera: close-up | wide | tracking | handheld | static (鏡頭語言)

visualFlow.transitionStyle: cut | fade | whip | match-cut (轉場風格)

promptTemplate.base: string (通用影像生成提示詞基調)
perShot: string (各分鏡對應的提示詞模板)
